hooks.command: r="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; d="$r/skills/commentable-html"; m="$d/.skill-resources-1.118.0.ok"; [ -e "$m" ] && exit 0; py=$(command -v python3 2>/dev/null || command -v python 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$py" ] && "$py" -E -s "$r/hooks/extract_resources.py" --version 1.118.0 --agent claude >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; true
